Model Hierarchy

Fallback chain, cost comparison, and best practices.

Fallback Chain

Loading...

OpenClaw tries models left-to-right. If the primary fails, it falls back automatically.

Cost Comparison (per 1M input tokens)

Free / Local Budget (<$1/M) Mid-tier ($1вҖ“$5/M) Premium (>$5/M)

Best Practice Guidance

вҡЎ

MiniMax M2.7

$0.30/M input

Use for daily operations вҖ” heartbeats, routine tasks, drafts, and background work. Best value for high-volume use.

Heartbeats Email triage Research Summaries
вң… Primary
рҹ§ 

Claude Sonnet

$3/M input В· $15/M output В· 200k ctx

Default model for all direct chat sessions. Best balance of intelligence, speed, and cost. Handles strategy, complex code, client drafts, and nuanced reasoning.

Strategy Complex code Analysis Client comms
On-Demand Only
рҹҸ—пёҸ

Claude Opus

$15/M input В· $75/M output В· 200k ctx

Escalation only. Not in fallback chain вҖ” invoke manually for major architectural decisions, complex multi-file refactors, and mission-critical deliverables where cost is justified.

Architecture Major builds Refactors Critical paths

Rule of thumb: MiniMax for daily ops В· Opus for heavy builds & chat В· Sonnet вҡ пёҸ locked out В· Gemini as cloud fallback В· Ollama for free local runs

Model Reference

Model Provider Input $/M Output $/M Context Role

Agent Skills

Installed automation modules PenPen can invoke on demand.

8 installed

Apollo вҶ’ HubSpot

apollo-to-hubspot

Active

Ingests cleaned Apollo CSV exports and pushes contacts + companies as deals into a HubSpot pipeline. Handles deduplication and field mapping.

clean_apollo_csv.py import_leads.py
mission_control/skills/apollo-to-hubspot/
рҹ•·пёҸ

Dark Matter Scraper

dark-matter-scraper

Active

Identifies automotive dealerships currently using competitor platforms (e.g., RevolutionParts). Scrapes target lists for conquest campaigns and PartSites outreach.

dark_matter.py dark_matter_local.py
mission_control/skills/dark-matter-scraper/

Vertex Media Generator

vertex-media-generator

Active

Generates product images and marketing visuals using Google Vertex AI (Imagen). Used for creating logos, hero images, and ad creative for SmartDealer products.

generate_image.py generate_image_sdk.py
mission_control/skills/vertex-media-generator/

WordPress SmartDealer

wordpress-smartdealer

Active

scripts/skills/wordpress-smartdealer/

UCS вҶ’ Tekion Mapper

ucs-tekion-mapper

Active

scripts/skills/ucs-tekion-mapper/

dmsconnect-download

Staff Daily Briefing

staff-briefing

scripts/skills/staff-briefing/
